seoTitle: Lismore Heights vs Liston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lismore Heights and Liston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lismore Heights vs Liston: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lismore Heights and Liston.
heading: Lismore Heights vs Liston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lismore Heights, New South Wales and Liston, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Liston has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Lismore Heights (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lismore Heights or Liston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lismore Heights has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Liston scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lismore Heights scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Liston scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lismore Heights or Liston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Liston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
